titleStmt.title: SII 39.145: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 145. (A.R. No. 145 of 1916.) NĀYAR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. PUSHPARATHĒVARA TEMPLE-ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA VĪRAPRATĀPA ACHYUTAIYADĒVA-MAHARĀYA, ŚAKA-1448 (1533 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of the village Pūttēriviḷāgam to the temple of Pūtteri Appaṉ by Nagamma-nāyaka, son of Poṉṉappa-nāyaka of Kandaṉavoḷu (Kurnool), for the merit of the king Achchuda-Mahādēvarāyar who bestowed the nāyakkattanam territory on the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mahā maṇḍalecura rājāyirāja rājaparamecuraṉ virapratāpa pūrvadekṣiṇa paccima Ut
tta samudrātipati Āḷāniṉṟa śrīviraaccuttaiya tevamakārāyar pradhvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa
1000 4 100 4 10 8- taṉmel cellāniṉṟa vicaya varuṣa mācimātam civarātri puṇṇiya kālattile nāyaṟṟu pūteri Appanukku tantaṉma
ṉama nāyakkar kumārar nākamanāyakkar camaṟpitta kiṟāma dharmmaśāsanam Accutarāya mahārāyar namakku nāyakkattaṉamāka paṇṇi
ṉamaikku ḷa kiṟāmam pūteri viḷākam nāyaṟṟu pūteri Appaṟku A taikkum Aṅkaraṅka vaipokattukkum cuvāmi Accuta
teva makārāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka kantaṉavolu ponnappanāyakkar kumarār nākamanāyakkar viṭṭa kiṟāmam pūteri viḷākam Inta kiṟamatti
ṭa mutal pūcaiyum Aṅkaraṅka vayipavamum naṭatta kaṭavatākavum Inta tarumattukku yāto ruttar Ahitam paṇṇinārkaḷ
kaikarayile ko hatti pirammahatti paṇṇiṉa pāvattile povaṉākavum
Digital edition of SII 39.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
